notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan grounds into a double play, second baseman Davis Schneider to shortstop Ernie Clement to first baseman Lenyn Sosa. Austin Hedges to 3rd. Brayan Rocchio out at 2nd. Steven Kwan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan grounds into a double play, second baseman Davis Schneider to shortstop Ernie Clement to first baseman Lenyn Sosa. Austin Hedges to 3rd. Brayan Rocchio out at 2nd. Steven Kwan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Chase DeLauter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chase DeLauter singles on a line drive to left fielder Myles Straw.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hedges grounds into a force out, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to second baseman Davis Schneider. Daniel Schneemann out at 2nd. Austin Hedges advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Davis Schneider.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw flies out to left fielder Angel Martínez.
